title: senegalia angico
intro: Senegalia angico, also known as the Angico tree, is a species of tree in the legume family that is native to South America. The bark and leaves of the Senegalia angico plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Senegalia angico include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Senegalia angico is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the bark and leaves in hot water, and can also be used in salves and creams for topical application.
